column1: # Unified 4 MB flash layout — SAME table for every board (LED fixtures + Orion)
# and identical to the IDF5 branch. A/B app slots are 0x190000 (1.64 MB)
# aligned (fixes the old app0/app1 size mismatch) and sized so the eventual
# IDF5 binary also fits — so a future 4.4 → IDF5 migration can be done
# over-the-air (the IDF5 app fits the slot and uses the table already in flash).
# 4.4 binaries sit well under this; spiffs is 0xC0000 (786 KB).
# NOTE: adopting this table on already-deployed 2.x devices needs ONE USB flash
# (a partition-table change can't be delivered over-the-air).
# Name	    Type	SubType	    Offset	    Size	Flags
